changeSet.author: cherevko
changeSet.sql:
UPDATE g SET g.edges_count = ( SELECT COUNT(e.edge_id) FROM dbo.Edges e JOIN dbo.Nodes n ON e.source_node_id = n.node_id WHERE n.graph_id = g.graph_id ) FROM dbo.graph g;
INSERT INTO dbo.tables (db_, name, type, author, version, service, description, column_count, created_at) VALUES ('liquibase_lab', 'graph_table', 'ALTER_TABLE', 'cherevko', 3, 'graph_service', 'Added edges_count field for denormalization.', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('graph_table')), SYSUTCDATETIME());
